item.title: That Practical Mom celebrates a small win
item.description: That Practical Mom shares a lighthearted mom-life moment about celebrating a small win with coffee and a little self-appreciation.

media:content.media:title: That Practical Mom celebrates a small win
media:content.media:description: That Practical Mom shares a lighthearted mom-life moment about celebrating a small win with coffee and a little self-appreciation.
